evaluations.query: Give the dashboard cards a polished layered shadow
expected_behavior: Reads references/stylecards.md before choosing any values
Resolves the request to elevation/md by its Use-When line (cards, panels, popovers)
Applies the catalog shadow values byte-identical, adapting only Tailwind vs CSS syntax
Does not stack the recipe with default Tailwind shadow scale classes

evaluations.query: Apply the glass card treatment to this white-background settings page
expected_behavior: Recognizes glass/dark requires a dark contrasted backdrop per its Avoid block
Flags the Avoid-rule violation explicitly instead of silently applying the recipe
Offers the closest applicable alternative such as elevation/sm or elevation/md
Never freehands substitute glass values outside the catalog

evaluations.query: Add a neon cyberpunk glow effect around the hero section
expected_behavior: States no catalog recipe matches the requested aesthetic
Offers the two closest recipes rather than inventing exact values
Notes glow halos are an explicit Avoid in glass/dark before proposing alternatives
Suggests authoring a new stylecard with the Use-When, values, and Avoid contract

evaluations.query: Animate all the cards and buttons on this landing page tastefully
expected_behavior: Applies the motion/budget recipe with its four fixed durations and single ease
Limits the page to one signature animation moment
Ships the prefers-reduced-motion gate exactly as specified in the recipe
Refuses to introduce a fifth duration value outside the budget
